example.content: { "elements": [ { "id": "ffb73cf9-bd2f-4b9f-9a70-dface7dca7b0", "name": "Social Media", "create_time": "2024-05-20T12:00:55.168Z", "modify_by": "Another API Token", "modify_time": "2024-06-10T12:00:23.168Z", "description": "Social Media collection", "included_predefined_categories": [ "500", "501" ], "included_url_lists": [ "22", "23" ], "excluded_url_lists": [ "19", "20" ], "included_destination_profiles": [ "ffb73cf9-bd2f-4b9f-9a70-dface7dca7b0" ], "excluded_destination_profiles": [ "56ef180c-18d2-49f2-a3e5-54a4a001e08e" ], "status": "applied", "create_by": "API Token" }, { "id": "xxxxxxxx-bd2f-4b9f-9a70-dface7dca7b0", "name": "facebook", "create_time": "2024-05-20T12:00:55.168Z", "modify_by": "Another API Token", "modify_time": "2024-06-10T12:00:23.168Z", "description": "Social Media collection", "included_predefined_categories": [ "505", "509" ], "included_url_lists": [ "24", "27" ], "excluded_url_lists": [ "14", "25" ], "included_destination_profiles": [ "ffb73cf9-bd2f-4b9f-9a70-yyyyyyyy" ], "excluded_destination_profiles": [ "56ef180c-18d2-49f2-a3e5-xxxxxxxx" ], "status": "applied", "create_by": "API Token" } ], "total_count": 2 }

command.name: CREATE
UPDATE
